title: Filing and recording articles and initial report; issuance and effect of certificate of incorporation; commencement of corporate existence
doc_html:
§25.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1976, No. 580, §1.  Acts 1983, No. 88, §1; Acts 1991, No. 334, §1; Acts 1991, No. 944, §2; Acts 1999, No. 342, §5; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
